sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12793" key="a)pokausmo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπο-καυσμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n12793.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">burning,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πάπων</foreign> Judeich <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Altertümer von Hierapolis</tr_> P.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0099.tlg001.perseus-grc1:142" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">142</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
